stemHtml: How is the vertical speed typically displayed on EFIS-equipped aircraft?

options.a: A vertical speed tape, with one white arrow that indicates climb, descent or zero.
options.b: A vertical speed tape with three arrows, one each to indicate climb, descent or zero.
options.c: A vertical speed tape with two arrows, one green to indicate a climb and one red to indicate a descent.
options.d: EFIS-equipped aircraft generally have no vertical speed indication.
